content: This model is intentionally simple and extendable. Future additions may include audit logs, plans/subscriptions, invitations, etc.
Tenant: Represents an isolated customer or organization. Fields: ID (string, Unique PK), Name (string), CreatedAt (time.Time), UpdatedAt (time.Time), DeletedAt (time.Time), IsDeleted (bool).

User: A person who belongs to a single tenant and interacts with the system. Fields: ID (string, Unique PK), TenantID (string), Name (string), Email (string), CipherText (string), Role (string, admin or member), CreatedAt (time.Time), UpdatedAt (time.Time), DeletedAt (time.Time), IsDeleted (bool).

Project: A resource owned by a tenant, created and managed by users. Fields: ID (string, Unique PK), TenantID (string), Name (string), CreatedBy (string, UserID), CreatedAt (time.Time), UpdatedAt (time.Time), DeletedAt (time.Time), IsDeleted (bool).
All entities include TenantID for scoping.
Auth token store the current TenantID and UserID.
Indexing Strategy: users - (tenantID, email) for login.
